subject: [PATCH v1] writeback: skip sync(2) inode writeback for filesystems with no data integrity guarantees

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the potential performance impact of skipping inode writeback and suggested exploring alternative solutions that don't involve modifying the sync(2) path.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new superblock flag, SB_I_NO_DATA_INTEGRITY, to indicate filesystems that cannot guarantee data persistence on sync. It then uses this flag to skip the inode writeback for such filesystems during sync(2) operations, improving efficiency and preventing potential hangs.
